zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Tancred於1228年出生在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬時，他的父親Roger Tancred31歲，母親Fredestinia d'Hauteville27歲。他和Irini Angelina至少有3個兒子。他去世於1323年8月27日在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根格皮根霍恩斯陶分享年95歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tancred
meanings: Old German: A name derived from the Old German name Tauchrat or Dancharat; from dank-rat, grateful counsel or councillor.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Tancred was born in 1228, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, his father, Roger Tancred, was 31 and his mother, Fredestinia d'Hauteville, was 27. He had at least 3 sons with Irini Angelina. He died on 27 August 1323, in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 95.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Tancred(이)가 1228년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Tancred(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Fredestinia d'Hauteville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Irini Angelina(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 8월 27일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 그o핀겐 그o핀겐 호헨스타펜에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.
